sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11112" key="a)oidoma/xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀοιδο-μάχος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n11112.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fighting with verses,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λογολέσχαι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.140</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Lucill.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
